allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add file hygiene protocols and tutorial enhancements

- Add Part 7 to Session Workflow: file size limits, archival structure,
  per-feature implementation checklists, structured YAML decisions log
- Add Part 9 to Tutorial: ongoing maintenance and quarterly hygiene
- Add Xcode integration guide to Tutorial \(Part 1, Step 5\)
- Update archival structure for immediate shipping of completed features

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add automated hardware profile detection for macOS and Linux

- Remove manual hardware profile entry from context recovery prompt
- Add bash commands for automatic detection on macOS and Linux
- Include CPU cores, chip/model, RAM, and GPU detection
- Update implementation checklist reference to per-feature format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Integrate quality-gate CLI tool throughout documentation

- Tutorial: Add installation step, update Phase 5 to use quality-gate
- Session Workflow: Update handover checklist to use quality-gate
- Implementation Checklist: Replace manual commands with quality-gate,
  add configuration section with .quality-gate.yml example
- Release Checklist: Simplify Phase 1 to single quality-gate command
- Session Summary Template: Update quality gate table

quality-gate replaces individual swift build/test/docc-lint commands
with a single unified tool that checks build, tests, safety audit,
and documentation coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
